title: pedicularis canadensis subsp. fluviatilis
intro: Pedicularis canadensis subsp. fluviatilis, also known as the Canadian lousewort or water lousewort, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the bumblebee balm family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of indigestion. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including the potential to reduce inflammation, improve circulation, and act as an antioxidant. Herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, are commonly used to harness the plant's medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
